default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SEO progress and unblock content production.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **SEO is volatile but promising:** "AI Recruiter" and "AI Interviewer" rankings spiked to \#9 and \#13, then settled at \#18 and \#28. This volatility is a normal signal of strong potential, but consistent top-10 ranking requires more content and internal linking.
  - [**Content production is blocked:** No new articles have been published since Dec 12, stalling traffic growth. Donald must review the 11 pending articles to resume the publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Brand refresh requires action:** Donald will provide new brand guidelines (font, colors), and Growth X will update all pending and existing article thumbnails.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**A full content refresh is planned:** All 55 existing articles will be updated with new brand assets, internal links, and a "Book a Demo" CTA to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Strategy

  - [**Keyword Rankings:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - "AI Recruiter": Spiked from \#100 (Jan 30) to \#9 (Feb 1), now at \#18 (SEMrush).
      - "AI Interviewer": Spiked to \#13, now at \#28 (SEMrush).
  - [**Strategy:** The volatility is a normal signal of strong potential. The key to stabilizing rankings in the top 10 is building more content real estate and implementing a robust internal linking structure.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Blocker:** No new articles have been published since Dec 12, stalling traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [**Pending Articles:** 11 articles are ready for Donald's review.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [6 are in "second review" (changes already made).](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
      - [5 are in "initial review" (target completion: Thursday).](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [**Process:** Donald will review all 11 articles in a single batch. Carly will ensure the 5 new articles are ready by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

### Brand Refresh & Asset Updates

  - [**New Brand Guidelines:** Donald will provide updated brand assets.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [**Font:** One open-source Google font family.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
      - [**Color Palette:** Toned-back, darker green (almost black).](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [**Pending Articles:** Growth X will update all thumbnail images with the new brand guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [**Existing Articles:** A full refresh of all 55 published articles is planned.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
          - [Update thumbnails with new brand assets.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
          - [Add internal links to target pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
          - [Add a "Book a Demo" CTA to bottom-of-funnel pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

### Analytics & Engagement

  - [**Traffic:** Sessions are stabilizing but growth is slowing. One pillar ("Enterprise Recruiting") is now seeing negative growth, underscoring the urgency of publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Engagement:** Engagement rates are exceptionally high (e.g., 56% average vs. 25% industry benchmark), indicating strong content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**AI Traffic:** The blog is attracting traffic from AI sources (Perplexity, Claude).](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
      - [**Google AI Overviews:** 21 prompts for "artificial intelligence in business" and 12 for "automation tools."](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
      - [**Significance:** The new structured data and internal linking will help Alex.com become a primary source for these AI responses.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [**Future Tracking:** Carly is working with an analytics expert to build a customer journey map from blog pages to conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Donald:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Send new brand guidelines (font, colors) to Carly.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Review the 11 pending articles ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [**Carly:**](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Ensure the 5 new articles are ready for Donald's review by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [Task the Growth X team to update all pending article thumbnails with new brand assets.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
      - [Scope the timeline and resources for the full refresh of all 55 existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Dv1FwZck-Bz5Kse7WS8TDyfXcAQQfD5f?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

action_items.description: Send brand guidelines (font, colors) to Carly; then Carly shares w/ managing editor
Update images on all articles to new brand; coordinate w/ managing editor
Prioritize review of 11 articles; publish after image updates
Demo CheckThat AI Overviews to Don next week
Deliver 5 additional articles to Don by Thu
Provide timeline to Don for refreshing 55 articles (images + internal links)
Add Book a Demo CTA to bottom of funnel pages
